title: Admissions: Homeless Students
description: Conroe ISD is committed to making sure students experiencing homelessness can enroll in and attend school without unnecessary barriers. The district follows federal law to ensure these students have access to the same educational opportunities as all other students, including immediate enrollment even if typical paperwork like records or proof of address is not available. Families in unstable housing situations can reach out to the district for support and assistance with the enrollment process.
